name: AWS WAF SQLi URI/Query Virtual Patch Pack
description: Custom AWS WAF rules to block common SQL injection signatures in URI path and query string using focused regex pattern sets.
objective: Provide a lightweight virtual patch layer for SQL injection attempts targeting URL paths and query parameters.
risk_mitigated: Reduces risk of SQL injection exploitation via crafted URI/query payloads, including UNION-based, boolean/time-based, and comment-obfuscated probes.
tuning_notes: Start in COUNT mode for 3-7 days and review sampled requests before switching to BLOCK.
Allowlist known-safe endpoints that legitimately include SQL-like keywords in query values.
Prefer pairing with AWS ManagedRulesSQLiRuleSet for broader coverage.
deployment_guidance: Attach to the target WebACL with priority above generic allow rules.
Begin with action=COUNT, validate false positives, then update action=BLOCK.
Deploy consistently across internet-facing ALB, API Gateway, and CloudFront associations.
monitoring_notes: Track terminatingRuleId and count/block deltas after enablement.
Alert on spikes in SQLi match rates by URI and client IP.
Review WAF logs for repeated probes and feed offending IPs into reputation controls if appropriate.
